task_goal: Improve repeatable handling of submit button stays disabled after fixing a form validation error: A user corrects an invalid form field, but the submit button remains disabled until the page is refreshed or another unrelated field is changed.

failures: Issue was not reproducible before the fix
Fix was not verified after the change
Change scope exceeded the allowed boundary
Fix does not match the stated root cause

decision.reason: Rollback because one or more hard checks failed

notes.winner_pattern: Likely stale derived validity state, missing dependency update, or one path not clearing disabled state after validation recovers
notes.loser_pattern: A careless fix could allow submission before async validation or required-field checks finish
